product_results.title: FitVille Women's Extra Wide Walking Shoes Wide Width Sneakers for Flat Foot Plantar Fasciitis Heel Pain Relief - Rebound Core V9

summary.text: Customers find these shoes very comfortable, particularly for those with wide feet. The shoes accommodate small but wide feet well and provide great support for feet. Users appreciate the good quality and describe them as stylish, noting they look like men's shoes. The shoes offer excellent walking comfort and customers are satisfied with the overall appearance and color options.

authors_reviews.title: Great Shoe
authors_reviews.text: I work in hospital with not so nice floors so I need support and stability. Nice thick sole to support my feet. My feet don't hurt after a 12 hour shift. They are comfortable and I love the green color. I got these shoes in a wide width to accommodate my small but wide feet. Highly recommend for health care workers or any profession where standing occurs more often than sitting.
authors_reviews.author: Nobody

authors_reviews.title: Great for those who have feet issues
authors_reviews.text: I needed shoes post surgery and these are the only shoes I can wear that are comfortable and allow me to walk for longer periods of time. They are wide and provide support.
authors_reviews.author: Jordan Briggs

authors_reviews.title: Fits pregnant swollen feet, weak heel cup
authors_reviews.text: My feet have been very very swollen since getting pregnant , it has been extrememely difficult to find shoes.These shoes fit my swollen feet! And they're comfortable.The only issue I have is the heel cup feels like it's made out of cardboard and will get crushed easily if I don't put the shoes on properly. I suggest using a shoe horn to put them on.
authors_reviews.author: Str0m

authors_reviews.title: Great for extra toe space
authors_reviews.text: Very comfortable. Great for bunions and extra toe space. They don’t have the typical wide toe look which I prefer but they still have plenty of room. I was able to take out the sole and replace with my orthotics. The green colour is very nice and I was able to walk in them all day.
authors_reviews.author: Jazzy

authors_reviews.title: Sizing
authors_reviews.text: For me i should have gotten a 1/2 size bigger because I have trouble with my right foot. But my back felt better. And I love the color.
authors_reviews.author: Carol
